L1.area: WebDAV protocol request handling and XML processing layer

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) injection vulnerability exists where the XML parser used to process incoming requests does not disable external entity resolution. A remote attacker can supply a crafted XML request containing external entity declarations, potentially enabling file disclosure or server-side request forgery.

L3.area: WebDAV method handling and its XML document builder utilities
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) injection vulnerability exists in the WebDAV request processing layer. The XML document builder used to parse incoming WebDAV method requests does not disable external entity declarations or DTD processing, allowing a remote attacker to craft XML payloads that trigger external entity resolution, potentially leading to file disclosure or server-side request forgery.

ground_truth.reason: The DocumentBuilderFactory used to parse incoming WebDAV XML requests does not disable external entity processing, allowing XXE attacks via crafted XML payloads.
